CVE-2013-4158.title: smokeping before 2.6.9 has XSS (incomplete fix for CVE-2012-0790)
CVE-2013-4158.description: smokeping before 2.6.9 has XSS (incomplete fix for CVE-2012-0790)

CVE-2016-20015.title: In the ebuild package through smokeping-2.7.3-r1 for SmokePing on ...
CVE-2016-20015.description: In the ebuild package through smokeping-2.7.3-r1 for SmokePing on Gentoo, the initscript allows the smokeping user to gain ownership of any file, allowing for the smokeping user to gain root privileges. There is a race condition involving /var/lib/smokeping and chown.

CVE-2017-20147.title: In the ebuild package through smokeping-2.7.3-r1 for SmokePing on ...
CVE-2017-20147.description: In the ebuild package through smokeping-2.7.3-r1 for SmokePing on Gentoo, the initscript uses a PID file that is writable by the smokeping user. By writing arbitrary PIDs to that file, the smokeping user can cause a denial of service to arbitrary PIDs when the service is stopped.
